current_positions.statement: Party A: Framework first, financial details to follow before signing. Urgency framing: 60-day court window. [DEFLECTION TACTIC 2: timing deflection + urgency pressure]

proposals.statement: Party A agrees to provide a high-level asset summary (home value, account balances, business interest range) before framework discussion.

current_positions.statement: Party B: Willing to work toward framework but wants financial figures confirmed before finalization. Mild concern, uncertain tone.

position_notes: The session ended with distinct starting positions preserved and at least one bounded proposal or package still open for further discussion.
